title: Swoopshaw
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''swoopshaw''' was a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] with its armor and weapons removed, designed for passenger transport. It could hold up to four passengers.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
